uplink.description: fPort 7 BME680 environment: temp 22.50 C, pressure 1013.2 hPa, humidity 55.20 %, gas/VOC 120.00
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds BME680 frame; values confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (PACKED float/pressure/ufloat). pressure is atmospheric hPa (uint16/10). Covers weather-station (air.temperature+air.pressure) and climate (air.temperature+air.relativeHumidity).

uplink.description: fPort 7 BME680 with negative temperature -10.00 C
uplink._note: Exercises the lora-serialization big-endian two's-complement float path for sub-zero air temperature; confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js.

Synthetic in-bounds GPS frame (int32 LE / 1e6); confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js. Covers gps-tracker (position.latitude+position.longitude). sats/hdop/altitude are camelCase extras (altitude not modelled by the vocabulary).

uplink.description: fPort 4 GPS fix without quality fields (8-byte lat/lon only)
uplink._note: Minimal 8-byte GPS variant; confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js.
uint16 LE millivolts / 1000 -> battery (V). Confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (raw voltage 3310).

uplink.description: fPort 1 pax counts: wifi 7 + ble 3 -> pax 10
uplink._note: People counts have no vocabulary key, so wifi/ble/pax are camelCase extras. Confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (pax = wifi + ble).

uplink.description: fPort 1 GPS + wifi + ble (12-byte opensensemap variant)
uplink._note: Combined pax + GPS frame; lat/lon -> position, counts -> extras. Confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: fPort 2 device status: voltage 3310 mV, uptime 100, cputemp 45, memory 229376, restarts 5
uplink._note: Status frame -> battery (V) plus diagnostic extras. Confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (raw voltage 3310, memory 229376).

uplink.description: fPort 7 with wrong length is rejected
uplink._note: Negative case: malformed BME frame must return an error, not partial data.
Negative case: fPorts outside 1-10 are not part of the PACKED format.
